audience: Belgian rental businesses comparing custom booking and administration platforms
searchIntent: See a real multilingual bouncy castle rental platform with booking, availability, delivery and invoicing workflows
title: BM Jumpfun bouncy castle rental and booking platform | VisualVibe

editorialNotes: Use booking rather than reservation in visitor-facing copy. Keep the tone practical and specific; do not imply measured commercial gains that the source does not substantiate.
